lenovo legion 5 intel speakers

Laptop Lenovo Legion 5 15MH05 (Intel)

Without patch, only headphones works but not speakers.
Tested on 14 main-n257625-587649902329

Tests:

plug headphones: only sound on headphones
unplug headphones: sound on speakers
repeat and same results
